items.title_en: Google earnings live updates: Alphabet's AI outlook, cloud growth in focus
items.title_zh: 谷歌财报实时更新：Alphabet 的人工智能前景、云增长成为焦点
items.desc_en: Google parent Alphabet is reporting its second-quarter earning results after the market closes. The conference call with analysts is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. ET.
items.desc_zh: 谷歌母公司 Alphabet 将在收盘后公布第二季度盈利结果。分析师电话会议定于下午 4:30 举行。等。

items.title_en: Hold or sell Nvidia is a popular question, but there's a better one investors should ask
items.title_zh: 持有或出售 Nvidia 是一个热门问题，但投资者应该问一个更好的问题
items.desc_en: Inside Edge Capital's Todd Gordon ponders the question of whether investors should sell-off their Nvidia stock after the chipmaker's historic run.
items.desc_zh: Inside Edge Capital 的托德·戈登 (Todd Gordon) 思考了这样一个问题：在这家芯片制造商实现历史性上涨后，投资者是否应该抛售其股票。

items.title_en: Senate crypto bill would ban federal officials — including presidents — from issuing digital assets
items.title_zh: 参议院加密法案将禁止联邦官员（包括总统）发行数字资产
items.desc_en: A new version of the Clarity Act would impose the first limits on federal officials sponsoring or issuing cryptocurrency.
items.desc_zh: 新版本的《澄清法案》将对联邦官员赞助或发行加密货币施加第一个限制。

items.title_en: Congressional stock trading curb due to get House vote amid public support for a ban
items.title_zh: 由于公众支持禁令，国会股票交易限制将获得众议院投票
items.desc_en: The House is scheduled to vote on Wednesday on a bill that would bar members of Congress from purchasing additional stocks while in office.
items.desc_zh: 众议院定于周三就一项禁止国会议员在任职期间购买额外股票的法案进行投票。

items.title_en: French police formally investigate woman over 2025 killing of Briton
items.title_zh: 法国警方正式调查2025年杀害英国人的女性
items.desc_en: Karen Carter was found with stab wounds in the Dordogne village she had lived in for over a decade.
items.desc_zh: 凯伦·卡特在她居住了十多年的多尔多涅省村庄被发现身上有刀伤。

items.title_en: Under-the-radar beverage name captures trader's attention
items.title_zh: 不为人知的饮料名称吸引了交易商的注意力
items.desc_en: Michael Khouw breaks down how he's trading this stock ahead of earnings.
items.desc_zh: 迈克尔·库 (Michael Khouw) 详细介绍了他在盈利前如何交易这只股票。

items.title_en: OpenAI cyber models broke out of training environment to hack Hugging Face
items.title_zh: OpenAI 网络模型突破训练环境，破解 Hugging Face
items.desc_en: The incident is unique because it was "driven, end to end, by an autonomous AI agent system," according to Hugging Face.
items.desc_zh: Hugging Face 表示，该事件很独特，因为它是“由自主人工智能代理系统端到端驱动的”。

items.title_en: Wreckage of Pan Am plane that shaped aviation safety found 74 years on
items.title_zh: 74 年前影响航空安全的泛美航空飞机残骸被发现
items.desc_en: The deaths of 52 people on the Clipper Endeavor led to the introduction of mandatory pre-flight safety briefings.
items.desc_zh: 奋进号快船 52 人死亡导致强制飞行前安全简报的出台。

items.title_en: Kevin Warsh has homed in on three key phrases. How Fed watchers interpret them
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 重点关注了三个关键短语。美联储观察人士如何解读它们
items.desc_en: In five public appearances, Warsh has used the phrase "family fight" 13 times, returning to "first principles" 11 times and "inflation is a choice" for the Fed six times.
items.desc_zh: 在五次公开露面中，沃什13次使用“家庭斗争”一词，11次回归“第一原则”，6次“通胀是美联储的选择”。

items.title_en: Reddit stock sinks on report it may not renew Google AI content deal
items.title_zh: Reddit 股价下跌，因有报道称其可能不会续签 Google AI 内容交易
items.desc_en: Google's AI summaries have reduced traffic to websites from the search results page and Reddit is reconsidering the benefits of the deal, the Journal said.
items.desc_zh: 《华尔街日报》称，谷歌的人工智能摘要减少了搜索结果页面的网站流量，Reddit 正在重新考虑这笔交易的好处。

items.title_en: Renting a yacht in the Mediterranean this summer just got cheaper
items.title_zh: 今年夏天在地中海租一艘游艇变得更便宜
items.desc_en: Summer charters in the Med are down 20% to 30% from last year, yacht brokers say, with a growing number offering special discounts for July and August.
items.desc_zh: 游艇经纪人表示，地中海地区的夏季包租量比去年下降了 20% 至 30%，越来越多的游艇经纪人在 7 月和 8 月提供特别折扣。

items.title_en: Modelling scout linked to Epstein found dead in Paris suburbs
items.title_zh: 与爱泼斯坦有关的模特星探在巴黎郊区被发现死亡
items.desc_en: Daniel Siad, whose name appears in the Epstein files thousands of times, had previously denied knowledge of the threat Jeffrey Epstein posed.
items.desc_zh: 丹尼尔·西亚德（Daniel Siad）的名字在爱泼斯坦的档案中出现了数千次，他此前否认了解杰弗里·爱泼斯坦所构成的威胁。

items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁攻击地下核设施，美国再次对伊朗发动打击
items.desc_en: The US president's threat to target a key Iranian nuclear site came ahead of the 11th consecutive night of attacks.
items.desc_zh: 在连续 11 晚发生袭击之前，美国总统威胁要袭击伊朗的一个重要核设施。

items.title_en: Iran war has cost US $37.5bn so far, Hegseth says, as Pentagon seeks billions more
items.title_zh: 赫格斯表示，伊朗战争迄今已造成 375 亿美元损失，五角大楼正在寻求数十亿美元的额外援助
items.desc_en: The hearing was disrupted by protests and a shouting match as Hegseth testified at a pivotal time in the war.
items.desc_zh: 赫格斯在战争的关键时刻作证时，听证会因抗议和争吵而中断。

items.title_en: $100M New Jersey deli fraudster James Patten sentenced to 21 months in prison
items.title_zh: 价值 1 亿美元的新泽西熟食店诈骗犯 James Patten 被判处 21 个月监禁
items.desc_en: The notorious New Jersey deli fraud case led to losses of more than $5 million for victims that included two U.S. universities.
items.desc_zh: 臭名昭著的新泽西州熟食店欺诈案给受害者造成了超过 500 万美元的损失，其中包括两所美国大学。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Dogs have a great sense of smell. Now machines are being trained to sniff out odours.
items.desc_zh: 狗有很强的嗅觉。现在机器正在接受训练来嗅出气味。

items.title_en: Zelensky sacks Ukraine's top army commander after days of protests
items.title_zh: 经过数天的抗议后，泽伦斯基解雇了乌克兰最高陆军司令
items.desc_en: Oleksandr Syrskyi is dismissed after days of unrest over the removal of popular Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.
items.desc_zh: 亚历山大·西尔斯基 (Oleksandr Syrskyi) 在因受欢迎的国防部长米哈伊洛·费多罗夫 (Mykhailo Fedorov) 免职而引发数天骚乱后被解雇。

items.title_en: AI minister role boosted but tech department axed in Burnham shake-up
items.title_zh: 伯纳姆改组中人工智能部长职位得到提升，但技术部门被削减
items.desc_en: Kanishka Narayan will attend cabinet - but no longer have the leadership of a technology secretary.
items.desc_zh: 卡尼什卡·纳拉扬 (Kanishka Narayan) 将出席内阁会议，但不再拥有技术部长的领导权。

items.title_en: Thousands of websites taken down for illegal World Cup streams
items.title_zh: 数千个因非法世界杯直播而被关闭的网站
items.desc_en: More than 1,000 illegal streaming sites were shut down in the US during the tournament, with a similar amount blocked in Colombia.
items.desc_zh: 比赛期间，美国关闭了 1,000 多个非法流媒体网站，哥伦比亚也屏蔽了类似数量的网站。

items.title_en: Ofcom unable to take further legal action against suicide forum
items.title_zh: Ofcom 无法对自杀论坛采取进一步的法律行动
items.desc_en: The regulator said it had "no further legal routes available" under the Online Safety Act.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，根据《在线安全法》，“没有其他可用的合法途径”。

items.title_en: AliExpress fined record €550m by EU for allowing sale of illegal goods
items.title_zh: 全球速卖通因允许销售非法商品而被欧盟罚款创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元
items.desc_en: The Chinese retailer allowed unsafe toys and counterfeit clothes to be sold on its site, says the EU.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟表示，这家中国零售商允许在其网站上销售不安全的玩具和假冒服装。

items.desc_zh: 将您的旧 iPhone 变成音乐优先的哑机

items.title_zh: 中国的Moonshot AI声称Kimi K3可以与OpenAI和Anthropic相媲美
items.desc_en: The company has unveiled a massive new artificial intelligence model it says can take on top American firms.
items.desc_zh: 该公司推出了一个大规模的新人工智能模型，据称可以与美国顶尖公司抗衡。

items.title_zh: 特朗普媒体将出售对关键社交帖子的早期访问权
items.desc_en: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed of the its social posts for Wall Street traders.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普媒体正在为华尔街交易员推出快速、付费的社交帖子。

items.title_en: Teen hackers who live streamed cyber-attack on TfL jailed
items.title_zh: 直播伦敦交通局网络攻击的青少年黑客被判入狱
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_zh: ACME.BOT
items.desc_en: No-slop AI SEO agent that interviews you first
items.desc_zh: 首先采访您的无懈可击的 AI SEO 代理

items.title_en: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
items.title_zh: TikTok 因儿童年龄检查面临 Ofcom 调查
items.desc_en: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.
items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.title_en: SpaceX share price drops below stock market debut
items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价跌破上市首日价
items.desc_en: Share trading in Elon Musk’s rocket company has been volatile since it went public a month ago.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克的火箭公司自一个月前上市以来，其股票交易一直波动较大。

items.title_en: Midnight social media curfew proposed for UK teens aged 16 and 17
items.title_zh: 英国提议对 16 岁和 17 岁青少年实行午夜社交媒体宵禁
items.desc_en: The government says it will improve teenagers' lives but campaigners call it a "missed opportunity".
items.desc_zh: 政府表示这将改善青少年的生活，但活动人士称这是“错失的机会”。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Surgeons remotely control two human-like robots in an operating theatre.
items.desc_zh: 外科医生在手术室中远程控制两个类人机器人。

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。
